Nguyễn Nhung
  • TỒN KHO TẤM PIN

Báo cáo Tồn kho tấm pin

Published

February 4, 2026

###BẢNG TỔNG HỢP
tong_ton <- full_join(ton_wms_bc, ton_diduong_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, ton_chuanhap_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0
tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(tong_ton = tong_ton_wms + tong_ton_diduong + tong_ton_chuanhap,
         ton_kv = kho_kv_wms,
         ton_cnct = kho_cnct_wms + kho_cnct_diduong + kho_cnct_chuanhap,
         kho_cn_noHD = kho_cn_wms - kho_cn_coHD_wms)

tong_ton <- tong_ton[c(1:3, 14, 4, 10, 12, 15, 16, 7, 8,9,17)]

tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_aio_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_b2b_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0
tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(tong_pin_can = so_pin_tamung + tong_pin_b2b,
         du_pin_saucap = tong_ton - tong_pin_can)
tong_ton <- tong_ton[-c(14:17)]

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(ma_moi = case_when(
    ma_moi == "COV1-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV1",
    ma_moi == "COV2-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV2",
    ma_moi == "COV3-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV3",
    TRUE ~ ma_moi
  ))

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  filter(Loai_pin != "TCT_Pin khác" & Loai_pin != "CN_Pin khác" )

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% arrange(Loai_pin, KV, ma_moi)

tong_ton %>%
  group_by(Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton = sum(tong_ton),
            tong_ton_wms = sum(tong_ton_wms),
            tong_ton_diduong = sum(tong_ton_diduong),
            tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(tong_ton_chuanhap),
            ton_kv = sum(ton_kv),
            ton_cnct = sum(ton_cnct),
            kho_ttqh_wms = sum(kho_ttqh_wms),
            kho_cn_wms = sum(kho_cn_wms),
            kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(kho_cn_coHD_wms),
            kho_cn_noHD = sum(kho_cn_noHD),
            so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tamung),
            tong_pin_b2b = sum(tong_pin_b2b),
            tong_pin_can = sum(tong_pin_can),
            du_pin_saucap = sum(du_pin_saucap)) -> tong_ton_x
tong_ton_x$ma_moi <- "Tổng"
tong_ton_x$KV <- "Tổng"
tong_ton_x <- tong_ton_x[c(16, 17, 1:15)]
tong_ton <- rbind(tong_ton_x, tong_ton)

I. TỒN KHO TẤM PIN ĐẾN 02/04/2026 14:36:13

1. Tổng quan
